page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7t.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance powered by the x86_64 architecture. It features 64 dedicated physical cores and 64 vCPUs utilizing the Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. The system is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a 2.0 GB per core memory-to-CPU ratio. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong multi-core processing capabilities. The instance achieves top-tier results in multi-threaded tasks, including stress-ng multi-core CPU performance, bzip3 multi-threaded decompression, and Geekbench multi-core execution. It also demonstrates strong performance in specialized tasks such as software compilation with Clang, ray tracing, image processing, and Passmark database operations. Single-core performance, memory bandwidth, and Redis SET operations fall within the average range.

From a resource-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent compute performance without virtualization overhead or resource contention. The 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio makes it a cost-effective choice for CPU-bound workloads that do not require massive memory footprints. This hardware profile is highly suited for multi-threaded applications, software compilation pipelines, database operations, and small-scale language model inference.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7t.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores running at 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. Equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM (2.0 GB per core) and a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps, this KVM-hypervised instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators. Benchmarks highlight strong multi-core capabilities, with top-tier performance in multi-threaded decompression, software compilation, ray tracing, and database operations, while single-core and memory bandwidth metrics remain average. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures stable, predictable performance without resource contention. This instance is highly suited for compute-intensive workloads, including CI/CD compilation pipelines, multi-threaded data processing, database operations, and small-scale LLM inference.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7t.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong multi-core performance for database and compilation workloads.

tagline: A dedicated 64-core compute-optimized instance delivering strong multi-threaded performance and high network bandwidth for demanding enterprise workloads.

128.0 GB of RAM providing a compute-optimized 2.0 GB per core ratio
32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
Strong multi-core performance in software compilation and database operations
Well-suited for multi-threaded processing, CI/CD pipelines, and small LLM inference
